name: Smoked Salmon Quesadillas
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium bowl, blend the goat cheese, horseradish, sour cream, and chopped fresh dill. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
- (The cheese mixture can be prepared up to one day in advance. Cover and refrigerate.)
2. Heat a heavy large skillet over medium-high heat.
3. Add one tortilla to the skillet and cook until brown spots appear on the surface.
4. Turn and briefly heat the other side.
5. Remove from the skillet and spread about one tablespoon of cheese mixture evenly over the tortilla.
6. Top with one-fourth of smoked salmon and sprinkle with additional chopped dill.
7. Repeat steps 3-6 with the remaining tortillas, cheese mixture, smoked salmon, and dill.
8. Cut the quesadillas into wedges and serve.
